title: borbonia candolleana
intro: Borbonia candolleana, also known as the Borbonia tree or the Philippine Borbonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain a high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Borbonia candolleana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and improve respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Borbonia candolleana is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
